tasks.label: 0. Kill All Champ Processes
tasks.command: pkill -9 -f 'gzserver|gzclient|quadruped_controller_node|state_estimation_node|robot_state_publisher|component_container_isolated|rviz2|breadcrumb_node.py|contact_sensor|footprint_to_odom_ekf|ekf_node' || true; sleep 1; echo 'Cleaned up - safe to relaunch.'

tasks.label: 1. Launch Gazebo
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch champ_moon_bringup moon_gazebo.launch.py rviz:=false

tasks.label: 2. Launch Nav2 + RViz
tasks.command: sleep 15 && source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch champ_moon_bringup moon_navigate.launch.py

tasks.label: 3. Launch Breadcrumb Node
tasks.command: sleep 25 && source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 run champ_moon_bringup breadcrumb_node.py
